title: VIX feed (light)
acceptance_criteria: Constructor takes a BrokerFeed instance; listens for ticks from the broker where symbol matches 'NSE:INDIAVIX-INDEX' (Fyers) or equivalent Angel One VIX symbol
Maintains lastVix: number | null = null; updates on each VIX tick
Exports getCurrentVix(): number | null — returns lastVix; null if no VIX tick received yet
NSE public API polling is NOT implemented in M1 — that is deferred to M2. A comment documents this: 'NSE-API polling deferred to M2. Currently captures VIX from broker tick only.'
No crash if VIX tick is missing — null is a valid return value; callers must handle null
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
